Prompt Summary: Dashboard portfolio — React/TS/Tailwind, widgets, docs, free deploy, prompt tracking CSV
What Was Requested: Build expandable dashboard-style portfolio; TypeScript + React + Tailwind; responsive mobile/tablet/desktop; full documentation; deploy free (Heroku or similar); Excel-like prompt log for learning
Outcome: Initial scaffold: Vite + React + TS + Tailwind v4; 7 widgets; widget registry pattern; docs/ folder + AGENTS.md; PROMPT-LOG.csv; Vercel/Netlify/Render deploy configs
What Worked Well: Clear stack choices (React/TS/Tailwind); asked for future extensibility; wanted documentation for humans and AI; prompt log meta-request is excellent for iteration
What Could Be Improved: Heroku free tier not mentioned as deprecated — used Vercel/Netlify instead; CSS library left open (Tailwind chosen correctly); no personal branding/assets provided — placeholders used
Notes: Open in Excel or Google Sheets. Add a row per new prompt.

Prompt Summary: Deploy to Heroku with URL containing AleksandraynerPorfolio
What Was Requested: Heroku deploy; URL must include AleksandraynerPorfolio
Outcome: Added Procfile, heroku-postbuild, serve then Express server.cjs; app name aleksandraynerporfolio; DEPLOYMENT.md Heroku section
What Worked Well: Specific URL naming requirement was clear
What Could Be Improved: Heroku no longer free — should have flagged cost earlier
Notes: User later switched to free host

Prompt Summary: Do we need to add project to git first for Heroku?
What Was Requested: Clarify whether git/GitHub required before Heroku deploy
Outcome: Explained: local git + commit required; GitHub optional for CLI deploy; git init already done
What Worked Well: Focused single question — easy to answer accurately
Notes: Educational — no code change needed

Prompt Summary: Heroku part not working
What Was Requested: Fix broken Heroku deployment
Outcome: Found: not logged in, no heroku remote; fixed server.cjs, moved build deps to dependencies, HEROKU-FIX.md
What Worked Well: Reported pain point without logs — still diagnosable from environment
What Could Be Improved: Paste build/log output when debugging deploy
Notes: Auth and remote were root cause
